title: A Conversation about Imperialism
subtitle: Historical Compression; insufficiency of simplified moral frameworks
description: A dense, searching exploration of collapsed histories and identities. Analyzes the ethics of power structures, liturgical imperialism, and the search for an orientation that survives historical drift.

motifMap.meaning: Multiple claims to truth from different centuries projected over one another; none fully erasing others.

excerpt: If all things are built on what came before, where does judgment begin?

sourceInputs: A Conversation about Imperialism and Gilbert K Chesterton.txt

editHistory.action: Corrected primary phase to Totem Current per user instruction.

integrity.notes: Corrected primary phase to Totem Current with Historical Compression as the variant per user instruction. Family set to Aftermath / Purification / Recurrence.
